s3_bucket_listing.description: Test common S3 bucket names for listing/misconfig
s3_bucket_listing.result: AccessDenied on all existing buckets - listing is blocked. No publicly listable buckets found.
s3_bucket_listing.detail: 5 of 10 tested bucket names exist (returned AccessDenied vs NoSuchBucket). Bucket listing is properly disabled on all. Bucket existence confirmed for: acorns, acorns-assets, acorns-dev, acorns-staging, acorns-prod.

s3_keys_from_recon.description: Extract S3 bucket names from live_hosts.txt
s3_keys_from_recon.result: No S3 bucket references found in live_hosts.txt

exposed_files.description: Check for exposed sensitive files on www.acorns.com
exposed_files.result: No exposed files. All return 403 (blocked by WAF/server) or 404 (not found).
exposed_files.note: 403 responses on /.env, /.git, /wp-config.php etc suggest a WAF or server rule is actively blocking these paths rather than serving real 404s. This is good security practice.

custom_headers_leak.description: Check response headers for internal deployment info
custom_headers_leak.result: Custom Z- headers leak internal deployment metadata: branch name (live), engine type (WebEngine), a unique deployment ID (z-zuid), and CDN provider (Fastly).
custom_headers_leak.detail: z-branch reveals deployment branch. z-engine reveals internal engine name. z-zuid appears to be a deployment/build identifier. z-cdn confirms Fastly CDN. While not directly exploitable, this aids reconnaissance by confirming deployment pipeline details.

sentry_dsn_leak.description: Check JS files for Sentry DSN configuration
sentry_dsn_leak.result: No Sentry DSN found in page source

findings.title: S3 bucket existence enumeration
findings.description: 5 of 10 tested S3 bucket names confirmed to exist (AccessDenied vs NoSuchBucket). Listing is blocked on all. Bucket names: acorns, acorns-assets, acorns-dev, acorns-staging, acorns-prod.

findings.title: Internal deployment headers exposed
findings.description: Custom z-branch, z-engine, z-zuid, z-cdn headers leak deployment metadata. z-branch=live, z-engine=WebEngine, z-zuid=8-4bf69f2-156d5j, z-cdn=FASTLY.
